description: Mack visits Elena to express his regret for their strained relationship and his wish to make amends. They share a vulnerable, emotionally sincere conversation, agreeing to move forward and take things slow. This tender moment signals their relationship's renewal after the chaos.

transcript.line: Hey. You mind if I come in?

Uh, yeah, it's, uh... I don't mean to keep you up. It's just, uh... I have a few things that, uh, I want to say... that I've wanted to say. But, you know, I... I can... um... I can be slow sometimes, so...
How many beers have you had?
N-No, it's... it's not that. It's... Uh, t-there are, um... situations that, uh... will, um... will get complicated, no matter how hard you try...
Mack. Today, we survived. It's been a good night. Let's not...
I screwed up. With you. I screwed up.
We've been through hell and back... both of us. And... I figured if... if I could get you off my mind, then that would help me be a... a better Director. You know, clear-headed, even-handed.
I don't know. 'Cause you're always on my mind. And today, when they took over Z1 and you weren't there... I never for a moment worried you weren't safe. In fact, I knew you would be.
I always told you not to worry about me.
I know. And you were right. I'm not asking for forgiveness now. Just, uh... just a chance to earn it. Eventually. All right, um... Good night.
